title: Track clients and control rejection/approval from forms submitted by clients
excerpt: Can I track clients and control rejection and approval of forms submitted by clients

posts.author: saidhajj (Saiadhajj)
posts.cookedHtml: Can I track clients and control rejection and approval of forms submitted by clients

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @saidhajj ,

yeah sure ,

you can track clients and control the rejection and approval of forms submitted by clients in Monday.com. create a board for client management, set up forms to collect submissions, use status columns for approval/rejection workflows
